title: Villager Bargain Charm
description: The Villager Bargain Charm is a magical item that provides a massive 99% discount on all villager trades when kept in your inventory. Simply carry the charm with you and approach any villager to trade - the costs will automatically be reduced to just 1% of
body: The Villager Bargain Charm is a magical item that provides a massive 99% discount on all villager trades when kept in your inventory. Simply carry the charm with you and approach any villager to trade - the costs will automatically be reduced to just 1% of their original price, with a minimum of 1 item required for each trade. The charm works universally with all types of villager trades and professions, making those expensive enchanted books and rare items much more affordable.
